allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(book.get\('slug'\)\) for book in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(book.get\('slug', 'N/A'\) for book in data\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{item['name']}: {item['type']}\\"\) for item in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Found {len\(data\)} files'\); [print\(item['name']\) for item in data[:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{item['name']}\\"\) for item in data if isinstance\(item, dict\)]")
